common.noAffiliation: Not officially affiliated with FIFA or Panini.

auth.googleAccountAgeRule: We only accept Google accounts older than 30 days.
auth.googleAccountAgeError: Your Google account is too new (minimum {min} days). Try again once your account is older.
auth.captchaPrompt: Verify you are not a robot.
auth.captchaError: We could not verify the captcha. Please try again.

catalog.title: Catalogue
catalog.tapHint: Tap a sticker to mark it (1 ✓), tap again for repeats (2×, 3×…). Long press to clear.

onboarding.geoExplanation: Your approximate location is only used to surface nearby trades. We never share your exact location.
onboarding.pushOptinHelp: Get notified instantly about new matches and nearby missing stickers.
onboarding.whatsappOptinHelp: Only if the other person also accepts. Your number is shared trade by trade.
onboarding.whatsappE164Required: You must enter your WhatsApp number to enable the opt-in.
onboarding.submitFailed: We could not save your preferences. Please try again.
